statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1016 — Brocard's problem n ∈ [111, 120] Lean 4 extension
  =============================================================

  Follow-up to STEP 1015 (n ∈ [101, 110]). Same Nat.sqrt-based O(log) approach.

  Target: n ∈ [111, 120] non-square verification (10 new theorems).
  Combined with STEP 980/990/993/1015/Brocard base:
    Rei-AIOS Brocard coverage n ∈ [1, 120] (125 theorems total).

  Honest positioning:
    - Berndt-Galway 2000: N ≤ 10⁹ (Brocard's problem search limit, far ahead of our n≤120).
    - Rei contribution: Lean 4 mechanical verification first record continues.
    - Brocard

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
